zh.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant是Walter Malefant和Joan Fitzhenry的兒子，於大約1225年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素。他於1254年與Alice Deleroche在威爾士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年在威爾士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素享年34歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾納什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant是Walter Malefant和Joan Fitzhenry的儿子，于大约1225年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素。他于1254年与Alice Deleroche在威尔士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年在威尔士布洛可爾厄普頓 卡素享年34岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾納什。

nameMeanings.name: Malefant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Rudolphe, Alain, Alcide, Camille, Pierre, Valmore.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant was born about 1225, in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Walter Malefant and Joan Fitzhenry. He married Alice Deleroche in 1254, in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1258, in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 34, and was buried in Nash, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant est né environ 1225, à Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Walter Malefant et Joan Fitzhenry. Il a épousé Alice Deleroche en 1254, à Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1258, à Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Nash, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant wurde um 1225 in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Walter Malefant und Joan Fitzhenry geboren. Er hat 1254 in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales Alice Deleroche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales und wurde in Nash, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant è nato il circa 1225 nel Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Walter Malefant e Joan Fitzhenry. Lui sposato Alice Deleroche nel 1254, nel Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1258, nel Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Nash, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefantは約1225年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアウプトン カストルでWalter MalefantとJoan Fitzhenryの息子として生まれた。1254年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアウプトン カストルでAlice Delerocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアウプトン カストルで34歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアナッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant(은)는 대략 1225년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 업턴 카스틀에서 Walter Malefant(와)과 Joan Fitzhenry의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1254년 웨일스 p브로케실르 업턴 카스틀에서 Alice Deleroche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 웨일스 p브로케실르 업턴 카스틀에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 나시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Walter Malefant e Joan Fitzhenry. Ele casou-se com Alice Deleroche em 1254, em Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1258, em Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Nash, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant родился около 1225 г. в местности уптон кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Walter Malefant и Joan Fitzhenry. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Deleroche в 1254 г. в местности уптон кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1258 г. в местности уптон кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности наш, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Malefant nació aproximadamente 1225, en Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Walter Malefant y Joan Fitzhenry. Se casó con Alice Deleroche en 1254, en Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1258, en Upton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Nash, Monmouthshire, Gales.
